name: clawcompany
description: Build for OPC(One Person Company), Every human being is a chairman. Multiple roles, multiple agents, multiple suppliers. Your Claws company, one key to run them all.
summaryZh: Build for OPC(One Person Company), Every human being is a chairman. Multiple roles, multiple agents, multiple suppliers. Your Claws company, one key to run them all. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
